details.console_errors: 2x mutation #5 message.newChat failures (one from pre-refresh attempt, one from post-refresh attempt)
details.chat_state: Empty chat screen with Ask Le Chat input, no response, no user bubble

apf_config.features: CRLF fix in convert_to_http2_response + space-normalization + body_complete fix

analysis: B18 CRLF fix did NOT resolve the issue. Same CONNECTION_CLOSED_NO_WARNING pattern as B17 (#271). Two separate prompt submissions both resulted in mutation #5 message.newChat failures. APF keyword detection appears to work (space-normalization from B17 still active), but the warning response injection still fails — connection closes instead of sending warning HTML. The CRLF fix in convert_to_http2_response was not the bottleneck; the problem is elsewhere in the warning response generation pipeline.

comparison.vs_271: Identical result (CONNECTION_CLOSED_NO_WARNING). B18 CRLF fix made no difference.
comparison.vs_262_266: B15/B16 with hold=1: HOLD_INFINITE_WAIT (keyword not detected). B17/B18 with hold=1: CONNECTION_CLOSED (keyword detected but warning injection fails).
comparison.pattern_evolution: Pre-B17: keyword matching fails → hold never triggers → HOLD_INFINITE_WAIT or passthrough. B17+: keyword matching succeeds (space normalization) → APF attempts to respond → connection close (warning response generation broken).
